responseFormat.note: PLACEHOLDER: actual question text and answer-option text per vignette are not yet defined. Fill in `question` and `options` fields below before shipping.

vignettes.text: Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex privately used a general-purpose AI assistant that had no access to company files, then reviewed the suggestions and decided how to apply them before moving forward.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex used a general-purpose AI assistant in the team's shared workspace, where Sam and other teammates could see the exchange, then reviewed the suggestions and decided how to apply them before moving forward.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex privately used an AI assistant connected to company files and past projects, then reviewed the tailored suggestions and decided how to apply them before moving forward.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex used an AI assistant connected to company files and past projects in the team's shared workspace, where Sam and other teammates could see the exchange, then reviewed the tailored suggestions and decided how to apply them before moving forward.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex privately asked a general-purpose AI assistant with no access to company files to recommend the approach, then used the AI's answer largely as-is.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex asked a general-purpose AI assistant in the team's shared workspace, where Sam and other teammates could see the exchange, to recommend the approach, then used the AI's answer largely as-is.

Alex needed to figure out the right approach for analyzing a dataset. Alex privately asked an AI assistant connected to company files and past projects to recommend the approach, then used the AI's tailored answer largely as-is.

Alex needed to come up with possible angles for an upcoming client pitch. Alex privately used a general-purpose AI assistant that had no access to company files to generate initial ideas, then selected, revised, and built on them using their own judgment.

Alex needed to come up with possible angles for an upcoming client pitch. Alex used a general-purpose AI assistant in the team's shared workspace, where Sam and other teammates could see the exchange, to generate initial ideas, then selected, revised, and built on them using their own judgment.

Alex needed to come up with possible angles for an upcoming client pitch. Alex privately used an AI assistant connected to company files and past projects to generate tailored initial ideas, then selected, revised, and built on them using their own judgment.

Alex needed to come up with possible angles for an upcoming client pitch. Alex privately asked a general-purpose AI assistant with no access to company files to generate the pitch angles, then used the AI's options largely as-is.

Alex needed to come up with possible angles for an upcoming client pitch. Alex asked a general-purpose AI assistant in the team's shared workspace, where Sam and other teammates could see the exchange, to generate the pitch angles, then used the AI's options largely as-is.

Alex had drafted a message to a client and wanted to check whether the tone and content were appropriate. Alex privately used a general-purpose AI assistant that had no access to company files for feedback, then revised the message using their own judgment before sending it.
